mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsApplyMberTypeDao.selectList */ select cc.code as apply_mber_type_cd , cc.code_nm as apply_mber_type_nm , case when ubam.bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_bsns_apply_mber_type ubam on ubam.apply_mber_type_cd = cc.code and ubam.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.code_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_CODE_TYPE}' and cc.enabled = true order by cc.code_type desc, cc.sort_order
